steps.title: Identify the constant term
steps.content: In the linear function $f(x)=42-0.16x$, the constant term is $42$. This is the value of the function when $x=0$.

steps.title: Interpret the starting value
steps.content:
Since $x$ is days after the start of the experiment, $x=0$ means the start:
$$f(0)=42-0.16(0)=42$$
So $42$ is the estimated water height at the start. The answer is A.
